description: PRISM energy analysis per query — matches paper Table tab:prism_energy

Laser (CW).note: 100 mW CW laser source; included in dynamic subtotal per paper Table

TEC (thermal stab.).note: 1W TEC is fixed overhead, amortized at throughput T: adds 1/T J per query

MRR tuning (TFLN EO).note: TFLN Pockels EO: capacitive, ~5 fJ/ring switching energy

GPU full scan (A100, 128K).note: Memory BW limited, ~2 TB/s, 7 GB KV

notes.TEC: TEC (~1W) is chip-level thermal stabilization overhead, not included in dynamic subtotal. Amortized at 10^5 QPS: ~10 uJ per query.
notes.platform: TFLN Pockels EO — capacitive tuning, zero static heater power per MRR
notes.scaling: Dynamic energy depends on d and N: DAC/MZM scale with d, PD/TIA+ADC scale with N, laser/driver/topk are fixed
